ab: Iraay ci Aso i loma’ haw?
en: A: May I ask if Aso is home?

ab: Iraay i loma’ cingra, ka picomod.
en: She’s at home, please come in.

ab: Iraay ci Hana haw?
en: A: May I ask if Hana is home?

ab: Awaay cingra, o maan ko salicay no miso saw?
ch: B:她不在，請問你有什麼事?
en: B: She’s not here, what can I do for you?

ab: Cima saw?
en: B: Who is it?

ab: Akong, ci Sonay kako, fohatenho ko fawahan.
en: A: Grandpa, this is Sonay, please open the door.

ab: O cima kiso saw?
en: B: Who is it?

ab: Kacaw, ci Mayaw kako, tayni kako i tisowanan a misalama.
en: A: Kacaw, I’m Mayaw, I’ve come to play with you.

ab: ’Alafinto a caka saso’araw kita.
en: A: Long time no see.

ab: Hai, tada ma’ilol tisowanan, katayni a miholol.
ch: B:是啊!我很想念你。快來聊天吧!
en: B:Yeah! I miss you so much. Come on, let’s chat!

ab: Kamaro’, pinanom to ociya.
en: B: Please sit down and have some tea.

ab: Ahowiday.
en: A: Thank you.

ab: Pinanom to ociya.
en: B: Please have some tea.

ab: Wata! manga’ay a nanomen ko ociya namo.
en: A: Your tea is delicious.

ab: Kakomaen kita to heci no losay.
en: B: Let’s eat fruit!

ab: Hai, mato nga’ayay kona heci no losay.
ch: B:好喔!這些水果看起來很棒。
en: A: Yes! These fruits look great.

ab: Nga’ay a kaenen ko heci no losay haw?
en: B: How is the fruit?

ab: Hai, so’lin a nga’ay a kaenen.
en: A:Yes, it’s really delicious.

ab: Maherekto misakalafi ci ina, katayni a komen.
ch: A:媽媽煮好晚餐了，快來吃吧!
en: B: Mom has cooked dinner, come and eat!

ab: Hai, monanaw kako to kamay.
en: A: Okay, I’ll go wash my hands.

ab: Halikaenen, o tao kiso a mimaan.
ch: A:盡量吃喝，你又不是外人。
en: B: Try to eat and drink as much as possible, you’re not an outsider.

ab: Adihay ko nikaenan ako, mafecolayto.
en: A: I ate a lot, I’m full.

ab: Adihayen ko nikaenan, aka ka ngodo.
en: B: Eat more, don’t be polite.

ab: Hai, nga’ay a kaenen.
en: A:Well, it’s delicious.

ab: Miliyasto kako, liyaw tayni sato kako a miliso’ tisowan.
ch: A:我要離開了，下次再來看你。
en: A: I’m leaving, I’ll see you next time.

ab: Hayda, nanay masaso’arawho kia.
en: B: Okay, goodbye.

ab: To^manto, minokayto kako.
en: A: It’s late, I’m going home.

ab: Miliyaw tayni sato a misalama.
en: B:Come again next time!

ab: Na’onen ko rakat.
en: B: Walk slowly and carefully.

ab: Hai, cilimaw tayni i loma’ ako a misalama.
en: A: Okay, come to my house sometime.
